rows.label: qev087603_MSG0001
rows.name: You have won my life. Take it now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0002
rows.name:
I fought for the right to have
Ga Derg see this treaty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0003
rows.name: Not to take anyone's life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0004
rows.name: [ST:undisp ]Nnngh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0005
rows.name: Bring them to me, Buidhe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0006
rows.name: But, my prince![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0007
rows.name:
These warriors of Earth have followed
our traditions and emerged victorious.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0008
rows.name: To deny them now would shame us all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0009
rows.name: Your Highness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0010
rows.name:
Come, humans. I would see
this treaty you speak of.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0011
rows.name:
I see. You propose that we stand
together as enemies of the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0012
rows.name:
Our people don't have any
reason to fight each other![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0013
rows.name:
Nopon and humans are best
friends now. Even more fun if
kitty cats are friends too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0014
rows.name: Ah, the purity and innocence of youth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0015
rows.name:
Fostering that innocence is a
part of our duty as adults.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0016
rows.name: It's a responsibility I take seriously.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0017
rows.name: As do I.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0018
rows.name:
The children of Lars live
far from this place...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0019
rows.name: It is their future that I fight for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0020
rows.name: Your Highness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0021
rows.name: You are called Elma, yes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0022
rows.name:
Disgraceful though it may be,
I must ask one condition:[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0023
rows.name:
We lack medicine for our people.
If you could aid us in this regard,
I would be most grateful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0024
rows.name:
I have far more respect for a leader
who puts his people before his pride.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0025
rows.name:
Yeah, you should be proud
of...not...being too proud, I guess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0026
rows.name:
Then please grant me this boon.
Buidhe can give you the specifics.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087603_MSG0027
rows.name:
When the Larsians are back to health,
we will stand beside you as allies.[ST:wait ]
